failed_attempts:

  have h₁ : ¬Tendsto f atTop atTop := by
    intro h₂
    have h₃ := h₂
    simp [f] at h₃
    <;>
    (try contradiction) <;>
    (try simp_all [Set.Ico_eq_empty_of_le]) <;>
    (try norm_num at *) <;>
    (try linarith)
  simp_all

  <;> simp_all [f]
  <;>
  (try { contradiction }) <;>
  (try { aesop }) <;>
  (try { linarith }) <;>
  (try { exfalso; linarith })

simp [answer]
  <;>
  (try decide) <;>
  (try
    {
      -- Since we are not provided with enough information to determine the actual answer,

      simp_all [answer]
      <;>
      (try decide)
      <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [answer]
          <;>
          (try decide)
          <;>
          (try
            {
              simp_all [answer]
              <;>
              (try decide)
            })
        })
    }) <;>
  (try
    {
      -- Similarly, if `answer(sorry)` were `true`, we would need to show that `Tendsto f atTop atTop` is `true`.
      -- But without further information, we cannot verify this either.
      simp_all [answer]
      <;>
      (try decide)
      <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [answer]
          <;>
          (try decide)
          <;>
          (try
            {
              simp_all [answer]
              <;>
              (try decide)
            })
        })
    })

simp [answer]
  <;>
  simp_all [f]
  <;>

  <;>
